title: docs: update README — 2026-06-27
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by app-update-metrics.yml.)

gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, keeping the latest news fresh for everyone visiting the repo.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the repository README.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most current news and updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot updating a giant digital billboard or reading a daily newspaper, representing the automated daily news refresh.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a pixelated newspaper next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
